stages.name: Ingest
stages.detail: Forecasts: SYNTHETIC: Demo simulation for testing; Anomalies: SYNTHETIC: Demo simulation for testing

stages.name: Clean
stages.detail: 1,152,000 anomaly rows and 1,152,000 forecast rows at 15-minute granularity

stages.name: Feature Engineering
stages.detail: Calendar, lag load, rolling load, peer groups, baseline ratios

stages.name: Anomaly Engine
stages.detail: VALIDATION MODE: Supervised scoring on labelled data (LEAD/PAKT validation only, NOT operational)

stages.name: Decision Layer
stages.detail: Risk zones, inspection queue, explanations, audit-ready JSON

model_cards.name: Meter Anomaly Scoring
model_cards.output: confidence tier, revenue risk, explanation, labelled evaluation metrics

model_cards.name: Labelled Theft Validation
model_cards.baseline: Leakage-free class-imbalanced binary classification with OOF thresholding
model_cards.output: PR-AUC, ROC-AUC, precision, recall, F1, top suspicious labelled cases
